arts.ttl: Andrew McKinlay hopes analytics can help Hearts fight Celtic and Rangers for title
arts.sum: Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today. However, Hearts have been working Bloom's company Jamestown Analytics to help find the right man for the job and will do the same for players if and when the £10million investment is rubberstamped.

arts.ttl: How much money Celtic have rejected after declining Premier Sports TV option
arts.sum: However, it seems that by opting out of the Premier Sports contract, Celtic have turned down the chance to earn £75,000 per home game with a maximum of £150,000 up for grabs if two Parkhead fixtures are broadcast. The Daily Mail has reported that Celtic have ‘opted out’ of an SPFL contract that gave Premier Sports the rights to televise a further 20 Scottish Premiership games this season.

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan shares his verdict on whether Aberdeen can challenge Celtic ahead of exciting clash
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of the fixture, Celtic midfielder Luke McCowan has had his say on whether Aberdeen could pose a genuine threat to the Bhoys’ title defence this campaign. With the international break in full swing, Celtic fans will already be looking ahead with excitement to the Bhoys’ top-of-the-table Scottish Premiership clash with Aberdeen in ten days’ time.

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan refuses to label Aberdeen as Celtic's title rivals just yet
arts.sum: And while Jimmy Thelin's troops have won 13 games on the bounce, Hoops midfielder McCowan says time will tell if the Pittodrie men are the real deal or not. But after seven games there are no title contenders.

arts.ttl: John Hartson says 'fantastic' Celtic hero has been playing better than Nicolas Kuhn this season
arts.sum: However, it is Nicolas Kuhn who is receiving all the plaudits at Celtic so far after his sparkling form has helped Brendan Rodgers to an unbeaten start to the domestic season. John Hartson praises hard-working Daizen Maeda at Celtic

arts.ttl: Comparing every Scottish Premiership squad cost as Celtic AND Rangers argument blown away – money table revealed
arts.sum: We've taken a look at how much it cost every team to put their squads together

arts.ttl: Celtic team news and Predicted XI as Bhoys travel to face Sligo Rovers in sold-out friendly
arts.sum: In the face of an international break and the need for some players to stay home and recover after Celtic’s fixture run, it is anyone’s guess who could start in Sligo, but we’ll give it a good go. Confirming he will be in charge against League of Ireland opposition, Rodgers revealed details of Celtic’s plan in Sligo for the sold-out fixture, stating his side will comprise a blend of youth and experience on the night.

arts.ttl: Steven Pressley 'honestly' explains why he 'appreciated' his time at Celtic more than Rangers
arts.sum: Signed by Gordon Strachan in 2006 on a free from Hearts, Pressley made his debut against Kilmarnock in January 2007 and then captained Celtic in his return to Tynecastle in a 2-1 over his former club. Steven Pressley is one of only a few players who have had the opportunity to play for Celtic and Rangers.

arts.ttl: Celtic's Luke McCowan shares how he is really feeling after not being called up by Scotland
arts.sum: Per the Daily Record, McCowan isn’t too fussed about missing out on the Scotland fold this time out with his focus firmly on Celtic, though he has indicated the chance to represent his country in the future would be an honour worth cherishing. It’s about showing you are as good as the player coming off and I know myself that I’m as good as the players that are starting.”

arts.ttl: The big lesson Celtic's new summer signings learned in tough win vs Ross County
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers’ recruitment this summer seems to be working a treat at Celtic as they continued their unbeaten domestic start against Ross County at the weekend. It took the Parkhead club until the 76th minute to draw level as a deflected shot off Celtic defender, Alistair Johnston found its way into the back of the Ross County net.
